Results X Print & Share Print PDF OREGON DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE OREGON CHILD SUPPORT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The Oregon Child Support Program provides the following services: -Establishing paternity -Finding the noncustodial parent -Establishing a child support order or making changes to an existing support order -Coordination of children's health care coverage -Determining amount of past-due child support -Collecting and processing child support payments -Processing spousal support payments in certain situations The Child Support Program also assists employers to understand and comply with legal obligations, such as reporting new hires, withholding income, and enrolling dependents in medical insurance plans if available. 1162 Court Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: None Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-5:15pm Email (503) 378-4400 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ST ANDREW LEGAL CLINIC ST ANDREW LEGAL CLINIC HILLSBORO FAMILY LAW
